name: Emerald Hibiscus
projectTitle: Commerce City Residential PM2.5 Exposure Tool
description: This Excel-based tool compares two engineering alternatives for reducing PM2.5 exposure among Commerce City residents near the Suncor Refinery and Rawhide Energy Station: Alternative A (community vegetation buffer) and Alternative B (home HEPA filtration + envelope sealing). It models pollutant concentrations from source to occupant dose, calculates cost metrics, and evaluates both alternatives across four structured criteria using a weighted MCDA framework.
